findings.source: WU-01 through WU-03, all 6 test files
findings.description: Regex patterns matching across lines in markdown need re.DOTALL. The . metacharacter doesn't match newlines by default, causing false failures in proximity checks across line boundaries.
findings.proposedRule: P36: Use re.DOTALL for regex patterns matching markdown content.

findings.description: Integration tester agent handling multiple tiers (integration+contract+e2e) confused reviewers when 'no mocks, real infrastructure' was applied universally. Contract tests mock externals by design. The no-skip rule for contracts means the framework must be available, not live services.
findings.proposedRule: P37: Agent prompts for mixed-tier delegation must explicitly carve out contract behavior.

findings.description: Expensive boundary mapped to integration tier creates guaranteed CI failures with no-skip integration tester. Fixed: expensive defaults to unit (mocked), user reclassifies to internal explicitly.
Architect v1 rejection caught 2 BLOCKs (build system globs, unverified skill injection) and scored simplicity 2/5. Pre-mortem predicted exact failure mode. Design went from 8 to 6 components.
Adding new agent file broke CI agent count test. 3rd recurrence of this pattern.
